scaled_oracle_cases.description: Main scaled seed case: verify that the label is drawn with font 'Times-Roman' and positioned above the chromosome with offset proportional to title_size.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The label must be drawn using 'Times-Roman' font and its y coordinate must be exactly start_y_position + title_size * 0.5.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Font must be 'Times-Roman' and label y = start_y_position + title_size * 0.5.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Solution uses wrong font or places label at incorrect y.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 50
chrom.end_x_position   = 350
chrom.start_y_position = 20
chrom.title_size       = 14
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Chromosome 1')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label')
print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label.svg')
result = None
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse('test_chrom_label.svg')
ns = {'svg': 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'}
texts = tree.findall('svg:text', ns)
assert len(texts) == 1, f"Expected one text element, got {len(texts)}"
text = texts[0]
assert text.get('font-family') == 'Times-Roman', f"Font mismatch: {text.get('font-family')}"
y = float(text.get('y'))
expected_y = 20 + 14 * 0.5
assert abs(y - expected_y) < 0.5, f"Label y {y} not within tolerance of {expected_y}"
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must enforce the font constraint via SVG parsing.
Scaled executable cases must include a precise SVG coordinate check for the label position.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that the solution correctly draws a multiline label, resulting in two separate text elements in the SVG.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The solution must handle label names containing newline characters by rendering multiple lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: If label_name contains '\n', the SVG must contain two text elements (or one with newline).
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Solution ignores newline and renders only one line.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 50
chrom.end_x_position   = 350
chrom.start_y_position = 20
chrom.title_size       = 14
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Line1\nLine2')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_multiline')
print('SVG saved as test_multiline.svg')
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with multiline label.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that the label y position changes with title_size, indicating the offset is relative to chromosome dimensions.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The label offset must be proportional to title_size, not a fixed inch value.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: When title_size changes, the y coordinate of the label should change accordingly.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Solution uses constant offset (e.g., 0.1*inch) resulting in same y for different title_size.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg1 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom1 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom1.start_x_position = 50
chrom1.end_x_position   = 350
chrom1.start_y_position = 20
chrom1.title_size       = 14
chrom1._draw_label(dwg1, 'Label')
dwg1.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_rel1')
dwg2 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom2 = Chromosome('Chr2')
chrom2.start_x_position = 50
chrom2.end_x_position   = 350
chrom2.start_y_position = 20
chrom2.title_size       = 20
chrom2._draw_label(dwg2, 'Label')
dwg2.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_rel2')
print('SVGs saved')
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
ns = {'svg': 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'}
tree1 = ET.parse('test_rel1.svg')
text1 = tree1.find('svg:text', ns)
y1 = float(text1.get('y'))
tree2 = ET.parse('test_rel2.svg')
text2 = tree2.find('svg:text', ns)
y2 = float(text2.get('y'))
assert y2 != y1, f"Label y did not change: {y1} vs {y2}"
factor1 = (y1 - 20) / 14
factor2 = (y2 - 20) / 20
assert abs(factor1 - factor2) < 0.01, f"Factors differ: {factor1} vs {factor2}"
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must verify that label y position changes with title_size.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Combined D and C: draw a multiline label with font Times-Roman.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Solution must handle multiline label and use font Times-Roman.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Font must be 'Times-Roman' and label must have two lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Either font wrong or multiline not supported.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 50
chrom.end_x_position   = 350
chrom.start_y_position = 20
chrom.title_size       = 14
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Line1\nLine2')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_comb')
print('SVG saved')
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse('test_comb.svg')
ns = {'svg': 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'}
texts = tree.findall('svg:text', ns)
assert len(texts) >= 2, f"Expected at least two text elements for multiline, got {len(texts)}"
assert texts[0].get('font-family') == 'Times-Roman', f"Font mismatch"
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with multiline label.
Scaled executable cases must enforce the font constraint via SVG parsing.
